meaning: adj.(动植物等)生产力已枯竭的,衰老的,疲惫的,衰微的
examples: Effete heart needs a moment rest.
No one therefore can accuse mr webb of being an effete peacenik.
During the middle ages Greek civilization declined and became effete.
This coupled with his dark sensuous eyes and full lips gave him an effete quality.
For all its creative excellence, the Ecole de Nancy was, then, no effete ivory tower.
